channel.title: AI on A Blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI on A Blog

item.title: The Great Awakening of Agile Engineering
item.description: Five hundred years ago, Martin Luther nailed a list of grievances to a church door. His complaint was essentially that the institution had buried the faith under centuries of bureaucracy and toll-collection—indulgences, intermediaries, a whole priesthood standing between the believer and God—and that you could get back to what mattered by cutting all of it away.
